overview.description: AI marketing agents for B2B SaaS teams
overview.description_long: Omnim is a multi-agent marketing workspace where AI teammates execute real campaigns across your existing tools. Rather than passive AI assistants, Omnim agents actively plan, coordinate, and run marketing workflows — learning your playbooks and operating inside platforms like HubSpot, Mailchimp, and Ads Manager. Platform plus services model. Built for B2B SaaS companies that need marketing to happen without hiring a full team.
overview.tagline: AI agents that actually do your marketing.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2025 by Kubo Kubis (CEO) and Martin Matus (CTO) to solve the gap between AI capabilities and actual marketing execution for B2B SaaS teams.

key_milestones.event: Raised pre-seed from Credo Ventures and Bek Ventures

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core value prop is using AI agents for marketing content and campaign orchestration — a use case that foundation model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) and major incumbents (HubSpot AI, Salesforce Einstein) are actively building natively. Very early stage with no disclosed proprietary data moat.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI marketing automation is a real and growing market, but highly competitive with many funded players (Jasper, Copy.ai, Persado) and rapid platform encroachment from HubSpot, Salesforce, and Adobe. Omnim's human-in-the-loop + services model differentiates but may be hard to scale.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Pre-seed backed by credible Czech/CE European VCs (Credo Ventures, Bek Ventures) with early access only — limited revenue visibility and very early stage. Runway uncertainty typical for 2025-era pre-seed.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early stage startup in a crowded market where the core AI layer is being commoditized by LLM providers. Without disclosed proprietary data or strong enterprise moat, displacement risk is elevated. Pre-seed stage means limited financial cushion.

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL. Website omnim.com is a parked domain; actual site is omnim.ai. Company is in early access as of March 2026. Prague location inferred from CNAIP source listing and Czech VC (Credo Ventures) backing.
